title: LosslessTreeDelta
description: A batch of lossless-tree ops to ship — the serde form of lazily-rs `TreeUpdate`, the output of `diff(their_frontier)` and the input to `apply_update`. Ops are ordered by dotted id; dependencies (parent/target/`prev`) are buffered on apply until they arrive, so delivery need not be contiguous. Op / seed vocabulary is defined in lossless-tree.json.
